title: No-anchor rank08 top28 subset 37->86 p005 gain
module_detail: M7 proposes side-effect-aware component subsets, M8 commits only the local component-37 island into component 86, and M12 validates the fixed delivery path with density_simple plus p005_area.
used_in_pipeline: yes: promoted as current no-anchor best after valid p005_area scoring
summary: Side-effect-aware subset proposer splits the prior 69-tracklet component 37 bridge. Rank08 moves only the top 28 target-similarity tracklets into component 86 / gid 960000350 and improves valid p005_area from 0.667536/0.528210/0.538672 to 0.668146/0.528669/0.539001.
implementation: Added a no-anchor component-subset proposer that ranks source-component 37 tracklets by target-component 86 centroid similarity and by video/camera side-effect slices. The promoted rank08 variant attaches 28 high-similarity tracklets, avoiding the weaker MCAM03/Tc8/MCAM08 tail from the full 69-tracklet bridge. The exporter was also made schema-compatible with subset candidates so case evidence tables show moved_tracklets, source/target components, GIDs, and similarity fields.
environment: Python native local run; no anchors; GT labels only used after materialization for full-score evaluation

workflow_steps.input: rank04+small-combo assignment, component 37/86, fused tracklet embeddings
workflow_steps.action: Generate component-subset attach candidates without anchors or GT labels.

workflow_steps.input: target-centroid similarity, video/camera slices, prior side-effect labels
workflow_steps.action: Prefer side-effect-aware subsets over full 69-tracklet bridge; select 12 diverse variants for direct full-score.
workflow_steps.output: top28_target_sim survives as best direct subset

workflow_steps.action: Score direct full first, then density_simple, then fixed p005_area only after positive signal.
Promote only canonical p005 gain; write README, PPT-style HTML, spec, metrics and cases.

visual_cases.title: Rank08 top28 subset: component 37 -> 86
visual_cases.summary: 28 moved tracklets with three sampled frames each. The case shows predicted_global_id 96000040 -> 960000350 and component 37 -> 86 for the committed subset. Raw frame pixels are absent locally, so this is coordinate-only fallback evidence, not a path failure.
visual_cases.failure_reason: The previous full 69-tracklet bridge included weaker tail tracklets and produced small side-effect losses.
visual_cases.improvement: The subset proposer commits only the strongest target-similarity island while keeping the delivery score positive.

visual_cases.title: Real-frame context: cross-camera global-id success
visual_cases.summary: Previously extracted real-frame montage showing what a true global-id evidence chain should look like when raw frames are available. Included to contrast with coordinate-only rank08 panels.
visual_cases.failure_reason: Coordinate-only case panels cannot show clothing/person appearance.
visual_cases.improvement: The report carries real-frame context alongside coordinate evidence until the current rank08 videos are available.

visual_cases.title: Real-frame context: same tracklet sequence
visual_cases.summary: Real-frame tracklet timeline from the earlier detailed report, used as a visual reference for bbox crops and repeated-frame support.
visual_cases.failure_reason: Single-frame diagnostics do not show temporal consistency.
visual_cases.improvement: Timeline panels show how repeated frames support a global-id decision.

ablations.name: full 37->86 bridge context
ablations.change: Move all 69 component-37 tracklets to component 86; previous promoted bridge.
ablations.decision: baseline for this subset search; useful but retained side-effect losses
